title: 3d Animated Doors
description: Custom 3d models that are for the Animated Doors data-pack.
body:
**3D Animated Doors resource pack**

This resource pack is a modified version of the Animated Doors resource pack by **Miraculixx**
{[https://modrinth.com/user/Miraculixx](https://modrinth.com/user/Miraculixx)}.


I've replaced the plain doors with custom 3D models, adding a visual upgrade to the original animated functionality. The core functions and animations, however, belong to the original data pack by **Miraculixx**.

My contribution involves some coding adjustments and 3D model creation, but the primary mechanics are derived from the original work. Huge thanks to the original creator for their amazing animated door features!

**SO I WILL REPEAT I DO NOT OWN THE DATA-PACK THAT IS REQUIRED TO USE THIS RESOURCE PACK.**

thank you for your understanding.

- All Vanilla Doors in 3d
